_note: Audit rules for the Slider component. Severity levels: high = blocking, medium = warning, low = advisory. These rules are checked against the rendered DOM and computed CSS. See compliance.json for mapping to platform standards.

rules.title: Slider control must use input[type='range']
rules.description: The interactive slider control must be implemented as a native HTML input element with type='range'. Custom div/span elements with role='slider' are not permitted.
rules.check: Every .slider[data-component='slider'] must contain at least one input[type='range'].slider__input.

rules.title: Fill element must be present
rules.description: The .slider__fill element must be present and must be a child of .slider__track. It receives the --fill CSS custom property for visual fill width.

rules.title: Range slider must contain exactly two range inputs
rules.description: A .slider.slider--range must contain exactly two input[type='range'] elements: one .slider__input (start) and one .slider__input.slider__input--end (end).

rules.title: Track and fill must be aria-hidden
rules.description: The .slider__track and .slider__fill elements are visual-only. They must carry aria-hidden='true' to prevent duplicate announcements by assistive technology.

rules.title: Input must have an accessible label
rules.description: The input[type='range'] must be associated with a visible label via for= attribute, or have an aria-label, or aria-labelledby attribute.
rules.check: input[type='range'].slider__input must have one of: aria-label, aria-labelledby, or an associated <label> element via id/for.

rules.title: Range slider thumbs must have distinct aria-labels
rules.description: In Range mode, each input[type='range'] must have a unique aria-label or aria-labelledby that clearly identifies its role (e.g., 'Minimum value' / 'Maximum value'). Arabic labels must be provided when the page language is Arabic.
rules.check: .slider.slider--range: each input[type='range'] must have distinct aria-label or aria-labelledby values.

rules.title: Focus ring must be visible on keyboard focus
rules.description: When a slider thumb receives keyboard focus, a visible focus indicator must appear. The outline must not be suppressed without replacement.
rules.check: Computed style of input[type='range'].slider__input:focus-visible must have a non-none outline or equivalent border/box-shadow ring.

rules.title: Thumb touch target should meet 24×24px minimum
rules.description: The clickable/touchable area of the slider thumb must meet the internal minimum of 24×24px. The visual thumb circle may be smaller if the input element itself provides an adequate touch area.
rules.check: The bounding box of input[type='range'].slider__input must be at least 24px in height. Visual thumb size flagged if below 24px.

rules.title: Disabled slider must be non-interactive
rules.description: When .slider[aria-disabled='true'] is present, the slider input must also have the native disabled attribute, and pointer-events must be none.
rules.check: .slider[aria-disabled='true'] input[type='range'] must have disabled attribute. Computed pointer-events on .slider[aria-disabled='true'] must be 'none'.

rules.title: Component CSS must not contain hardcoded visual values
rules.description: No hardcoded hex, rgb(), hsl(), or pixel values for color, spacing, or radius may appear in slider.css production selectors. All values must reference var(--slider-*) semantic tokens.
rules.check: slider.css must not contain hex color literals, rgb(), hsl() in non-fallback positions. Spacing and radius values must use var(--slider-*) or var(--radius-*/--spacing-*).

rules.title: RTL layout must be implemented via [dir='rtl'] selector
rules.description: RTL support must use the [dir='rtl'] CSS attribute selector. Physical directional properties (left, right, margin-left, margin-right) must be replaced with logical properties or scoped under [dir='rtl']. Fill direction, value position, and label alignment must all reverse in RTL.
rules.check: slider.css must contain [dir='rtl'] selectors covering: fill direction, label text-align, helper text direction, and value element order.

rules.title: All slider-scoped tokens must be defined in token.css
rules.description: Once the component is promoted from draft to stable, all --slider-* tokens referenced in slider.css must be defined in token.css. This rule is advisory until overall_status changes from pending_audit.
rules.check: token.css must define all --slider-* tokens listed in reference.json §tokens. Currently failing — all tokens are pending.

rules.title: All classes in template.html must exist in slider.css
rules.description: Every CSS class used in template.html must have a corresponding selector defined in slider.css. No orphan template classes permitted.
rules.check: Extract all class names from template.html. Verify each class exists in slider.css as a selector.

rules.title: All documented states in contract.md must have a CSS selector
rules.description: Every state listed in slider.contract.md §State Reference must have a corresponding CSS selector in slider.css.

rules.title: Showcase Code tab must contain only reusable component markup
rules.description: The Code tab in each showcase example must expose only the component's root element and its children. Showcase wrappers, headings, labels, and JavaScript must not appear in copied code.
rules.check: Manual review: copy a code block from showcases/index.html and verify it can be used directly in an external page without modification.
